productDisplayName: Puma Men's Deccan Chargers Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Composition100% cotton polo t-shirt in blue with white and red stripes along the hem of the collar and sleeves, and bold team branding along the left shoulder and puma branding on the right shoulderWash care1. Normal action 40 degree2. Wash dark colours separately3. Normal tumble dry4. Reverse iron on printWarn the opposition to keep at bay in this blue fan wear polo t-shirt of the Deccan Chargers. Made of 100% cotton, this tee keeps you dry and comfortable all through the IPL season, while the charging bull and the team name in light blue print across the left shoulder exuding power and energy. Cheer the former IPL champs to another big victory in this tee.
